# NucleoOS partition table (8 MB flash): # The 2.5 MB factory bank was redundant (idf.py flashes the app to a single slot and serial is the
# real path). Folding it into the OTA banks takes each from 2304 -> 3584 KB: image ~1980 KB = 55%

column3: with full A/B OTA + rollback intact. idf.py flash writes the app to ota_0 and

no factory. See docs/partition-table.md: so a serial reflash boots ota_0 cleanly; main.c confirms the image (cancel-rollback)
the bootloader rolls back to the other bank on a bad one. nvs/otadata/phy/
